content:
Add android members  like ios and investor too deals too FINAL ANDROID MODULE SYNC + REAL DATA ONLY

Fix Android to match iOS exactly.

TASKS:
1. Android Home must show same modules as iOS:
   - Members
   - Investors
   - Live Deals
   - Annual Returns
   - Buy Property Shares
   - JV Partnerships
   - Smart Investing
   - Investor Dashboard
   - CRM
2. Remove all invented/chatbot/demo/fake member counts.
3. Members count must come only from real database records.
4. Show exactly:
   - 38 Members
   - 6 Investors
   - 3 Live Deals
   - Up to 22% Annual Returns
5. If real DB count is different, report exact database source and row count before changing UI.
6. Android and iOS must use the same shared data source, not separate hardcoded values.
7. Verify Android screenshot matches iOS module layout and counts.
8. Verify no placeholder/mock/demo members remain.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
ANDROID_HOME_STATUS:
IOS_HOME_STATUS:
REAL_MEMBERS_SOURCE:
REAL_MEMBERS_COUNT:
INVESTORS_COUNT:
LIVE_DEALS_COUNT:
FAKE_DATA_REMOVED:
FILES_CHANGED:
TESTS_RUN:
ANDROID_SCREENSHOT:
IOS_SCREENSHOT:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Only mark VERIFIED when Android shows the same real modules and real counts as iOS.
No fake members. No chatbot members. No demo counts.
